shows.title: Witnessing Miracles / Expanding Intuition
shows.guests: Joshua W. Brown, Tanya Carroll Richardson
shows.first_half: First Half: The time of miracles is upon us as Easter Sunday is just a few days away. Joshua W. Brown, PhD, will discuss modern-day claims of miraculous healings and what science and medicine have to say. He'll also talk about the numerous remarkable miracles he says he's seen on his many travels.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Spiritual author Tanya Carroll Richardson will explain how people can expand their intuition. She'll talk about the four main psychic pathways and their functions. Richardson will also outline how to manage your intuition when you're picking up on too much and become overwhelmed.

shows.title: Celebrities in the Afterlife /  Open Lines
shows.guests: Ben Jacob, Monique Ramirez, Open Lines
shows.first_half: Podcasters Ben Jacob and Monique Ramirez will discuss their show, Who's Dead From Your Favorite Movie?, which delves into films and honors cast members who are now in the afterlife. They'll describe how they pay homage to the stars of iconic movies that never die. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half— give George a call and discuss whatever's on your mind!
